action_set_definitions.name: get_current_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state of the microgrid, including time, load, renewable generation, and battery storage levels.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dispatch_step
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the dispatch decisions for the current hour and advances the simulation to the next time step. Returns the resulting environment state.

battery_power_mw.description: The power output from the battery in MW. Positive values represent discharging (max 5.0), negative values represent charging (min -5.0).

generator_on.description: Signal to activate or maintain the backup diesel generator. Note: A 1-hour startup latency applies where no power is produced.

state_description.grid_load_mw: Current total electricity demand in Megawatts
state_description.solar_generation_mw: Current power output from solar arrays in Megawatts
state_description.wind_generation_mw: Current power output from wind turbines in Megawatts
state_description.battery_soc_pct: State of Charge of the energy storage system as a percentage (0-100)
state_description.battery_capacity_mwh: Total storage capacity of the battery system in Megawatt-hours
state_description.market_price_per_mwh: Current cost to purchase electricity from the external grid ($/MWh)
state_description.generator_active: Whether the backup diesel generator is currently running
